_meta.note: This file is the source of truth for all portfolio content. The upload skill updates it automatically.

settings.printInquiriesText: For print inquiries, please get in touch.
settings.printNote: Each print is signed and numbered. Editions are strictly limited.

series.title: Texture & Dormancy
series.subtitle: Winter — New England, 2025
series.description: Winter landscapes and still forms shot across New England in late 2025. Organic textures, bare structure, quiet light.

series.title: Savannah 2026
series.subtitle: Savannah, GA — Early 2026
series.description: Street life and architecture in the American South. Shot across multiple film stocks.

series.title: Intimacy
series.subtitle: Portraits — Medium Format
series.description: An observation of intimate moments shared in public spaces among complete strangers.

series.title: Quincy Quarries
series.subtitle: Quincy, MA
series.description: An industrial landscape reclaimed by time and water. Granite, shadow, and the geometry of abandonment.

series.title: Through the Purple
series.subtitle: Lomography Purple — Parks & Outdoor
series.description: Shot on Lomography Purple, a film that swaps the green channel for violet — grass and foliage render in purple and magenta. An unmistakable, otherworldly palette.

series.title: SFX Infrared
series.subtitle: Ilford SFX with red filter
series.description: Ilford SFX with a deep red filter — foliage rendered white, skies near black. A different kind of seeing.

series.title: Coastal New England
series.subtitle: New England Coastline
series.description: Rocky shorelines, lighthouses, harbors. The New England coast in black and white.

series.title: 2025 Seasons
series.subtitle: A year of shooting
series.description: A year-long study shot on 35mm, medium format, and 4×5 large format across New England and beyond.

series.title: Portraits
series.subtitle: Medium Format — People & Place
series.description: Candid portraits and quiet human moments. Shot primarily on medium format, the larger negative rewards the intimacy of the subject.

series.title: The Light Unseen
series.subtitle: Infrared — Ilford SFX · Pentax 6×7
series.description: Shot on Ilford SFX 200, an extended red-sensitivity film that reaches into the near-infrared spectrum when paired with a deep red filter. Foliage renders white, skies collapse to near black, and water takes on an otherworldly stillness. The Pentax 6×7's large negative reveals every tonal gradation the film can hold — a different kind of seeing, made visible only in the print.
